prompt: I have an idea for a mobile fitness tracking app. Can you help me document the product requirements?
expected_output: Skill triggers correctly, checks for existing context via prism-locator agent, invokes /generate_prd command, saves output to .prism/shared/plans/, and offers next workflow steps
